fields.description: A unique name for this agent.
fields.label: Agent Name

fields.description: The AI provider that will power this agent (e.g., OpenAI, OpenRouter).
fields.label: Provider

fields.description: The specific AI model to use from the selected provider (e.g., gpt-4-turbo).
fields.label: Model

fields.description: Specific model for Text-to-Speech (Audio Generation). If unset, defaults to the provider's default TTS model.
fields.label: TTS Model

fields.description: Voice to use for TTS (e.g. alloy, echo, onyx).
fields.label: TTS Voice

fields.description: How this agent's prompt is managed. 'Local' uses the instructions field below. 'Template' links to a reusable Agent Prompt.
fields.label: Prompt Mode

fields.description: Link to a reusable prompt template from the Agent Prompt library.
fields.label: Agent Prompt

fields.description: If checked, this agent will stay on the prompt version it was attached to, ignoring newer versions.
fields.label: Lock Prompt Version

fields.description: The version number of the prompt template when it was attached to this agent.
fields.label: Attached at Version

fields.description: If this agent was detached from a template, this tracks the original prompt for traceability.
fields.label: Copied From Prompt

fields.description: If this agent was detached from a summary prompt template, this tracks the original summary prompt for traceability.
fields.label: Copied From Summary Prompt

fields.description: The system prompt or instructions that define the agent's personality, goals, and constraints. This is the core logic of the agent.
fields.label: Instructions

fields.description: What sampling temperature to use, between 0 and 2. Higher values like 0.8 will make the output more random, while lower values like 0.2 will make it more focused and deterministic.
fields.label: Temperature

fields.description: The set of tools this agent is allowed to use to interact with the system.
fields.label: Agent Tool

fields.description: Connect to external MCP servers for additional tool capabilities
fields.label: MCP Servers

fields.description: External MCP servers this agent can use for additional tools
fields.label: MCP Servers

fields.description:
An alternative to sampling with temperature, called nucleus sampling, where the model considers the results of the tokens with top_p probability mass. So 0.1 means only the tokens comprising the top 10% probability mass are considered.

We generally recommend altering this or temperature but not both.
fields.label: Top P

fields.description: If checked, this agent will be disabled and will not run.
fields.label: Disabled

fields.description: Define system prompt, goal, and constraints. Use 'Local' for inline prompts or 'Template' to link a reusable prompt from the library.
fields.label: Prompt

fields.description: If checked, this agent can be interacted with in the Agent Chat window.
fields.label: Allow Chat

fields.description: If checked, the conversation history with this agent will be saved and loaded for future sessions.
fields.label: Persist Conversation

fields.description: Knowledge sources this agent can access
fields.label: Knowledge Sources

fields.description: Define the rules for how the agent manages its memory window when a conversation grows long and approaches token limits.
fields.label: Conversation Strategy

fields.description: How to handle conversation history when it exceeds the limit. 'Summarize' compresses old messages, 'FIFO' drops them.
fields.label: Context Strategy

fields.description: Maximum number of messages to keep in active context before applying strategy.
fields.label: History Limit

fields.description: Ratio of history to summarize effectively. 0.7 means 70% of oldest messages.
fields.label: Summary Ratio

fields.description: Optional: Lightweight model to use specifically for summarization tasks.
fields.label: Summary Model

fields.description: How this agent's conversation summary prompt is managed. 'Local' uses the summary prompt field below. 'Template' links to a reusable Agent Summary Prompt.
fields.label: Summary Prompt Mode

fields.description: Link to a reusable summary prompt template from the Agent Summary Prompt library for conversation summarization.
fields.label: Summary Prompt Template

fields.description: If checked, this agent will stay on the summary prompt version it was attached to, ignoring newer versions.
fields.label: Lock Summary Prompt Version

fields.description: The version number of the summary prompt template when it was attached to this agent.
fields.label: Summary Attached at Version

fields.description: The prompt used to summarize conversation history when the context strategy is 'Summarize'. Leave blank to use the system default.
fields.label: Summary Prompt

fields.description: Maximum tokens to use for injected knowledge context.
fields.label: Max Knowledge Tokens

fields.description: Maximum consecutive turns/steps the agent can take in a single run.
fields.label: Max Turns

fields.description: Configure language model settings
fields.label: LLM Configuration

fields.description: Configure conversation behaviour
fields.label: Conversation Settings

fields.description: A short summary describing what this agent does or is designed for.
fields.label: Description

fields.description: When checked, Doc Event and Scheduled runs create / maintain conversation history per initiating user (or trigger owner). If unchecked, a single shared history is used.
fields.label: Persist per User (Doc/Schedule)

fields.description: This is the provider standard name
fields.label: Chef

fields.description: Enables multi-step planning and execution. If enabled, the agent will analyze the request to create a step-by-step plan (or use a Default Plan) and execute them sequentially.
fields.label: Enable Multi Run

fields.description: Configure prompt caching to reduce costs by caching repeated prompt content
fields.label: Prompt Caching

fields.description: Enable prompt caching to cache repeated prompt content and reduce token costs. Only works with supported providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Bedrock, Deepseek).
fields.label: Enable Prompt Caching

fields.description: Cache control type: 'ephemeral' for Anthropic (charges for cache writes), 'auto' for OpenAI/Deepseek (automatic caching).
fields.label: Cache Control Type

fields.description: Cache the system message/instructions to avoid re-sending them on every request.
fields.label: Cache System Message

fields.description: Cache conversation history messages to reduce token usage in multi-turn conversations.
fields.label: Cache Conversation History

fields.description: If checked, this agent can be run by Guest users (via API).
fields.label: Allow Guest

fields.description: If enabled, the agent can store key-value pairs in the conversation context.
fields.label: Allow Conversation Data Management

fields.description: Auto-injects all active memory items into the LLM system prompt on every turn. Disabling this avoids 'Context Bloat' (saving tokens/cost and improving speed) and allows on-demand access strictly through the 'get_conversation_data' tool.
fields.label: Inject Conversation Data into Prompt

fields.description: Optional: Link specific Model for Image generation tool otherwise default model of the Agent's provider will be used
fields.label: Image Generation Model

fields.description: This color will be used to display as the background color of Agent Avatar in Agent Chat. Enter color code including #, ex: #6366F1
fields.label: Agent Color

fields.description: If enabled, the conversation title will be automatically updated based on the initial context.
fields.label: Autonaming of conversation title

fields.description: Specific model for Speech-to-Text (Audio Transcription). If unset, defaults to the provider's default STT model.
fields.label: STT Model

fields.description: Maximum characters allowed for tool results before truncating and applying include_reference context policy.
fields.label: Max Context Characters

fields.description:
Enable to display tool execution status and responses in the agent output.
This includes whether each tool call is completed and its corresponding result.
fields.label: Show Tool Execution Details

fields.description: Configure the model and prompts used to compress conversation history. These settings are only active when using the Summarize strategy.
fields.label: Summarization Engine

fields.description: Set strict boundaries on how much external data the agent can pull into its context window at once.
fields.label: Knowledge And Tools

fields.description: Enable or disable background tasks and auxiliary capabilities related to context management.
fields.label: Agent Behaviors
